task_completion.description: Load the countries and populated places shapefiles into the GIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layers panel shows both 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' and 'ne_110m_populated_places' loaded in the GIS interface.

task_completion.description: Open the spatial analysis tool used to count points within polygons.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for 'Count Points in Polygon' (or an equivalent spatial join/count tool) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Configure the count tool with the correct input layers and the required output field name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tool dialog shows the countries layer selected as the polygon/input layer, the populated places layer selected as the points layer, and the count field name explicitly set to 'NUMPOINTS'.

task_completion.description: Execute the tool to generate the new layer containing the point counts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new layer (e.g., 'Count', 'Joined layer') appears in the layers panel, or a progress bar/success log indicates the tool has finished running.

task_completion.description: Open the export dialog for the newly created layer and select the GeoJSON format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save Vector Layer as...' or export dialog is open for the counted layer, with the format dropdown explicitly set to 'GeoJSON'.

task_completion.description: Save the exported GeoJSON file to the exact required directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file path in the save dialog or a file manager confirms the file is being saved as 'countries_with_place_count.geojson' in the '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical GIS application (like QGIS) to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GIS GUI rather than solely executing Python scripts or GDAL/OGR commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely executed the spatial count operation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tool's execution log or progress bar is visible, or the resulting attribute table shows varying integer counts (not manually typed or all zeros).

integrity.description: The agent properly exported the file as a GeoJSON rather than just changing a file extension.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog shows 'GeoJSON' selected in the format dropdown, rather than keeping 'ESRI Shapefile' and manually typing '.geojson' at the end of the filename.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input shapefiles are 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp' and 'ne_110m_populated_places.shp', located in '/home/ga/GIS_Data/natural_earth'. The output must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/countries_with_place_count.geojson'. The output layer must contain a field named 'NUMPOINTS'. A correct spatial join will result in exactly 177 polygon features with a total point count of 213 across all polygons.
